questionText: How do your total Scope 3 emissions for the reporting year compare to those of the previous reporting year?
questionKo: 보고연도의 총 Scope 3 배출량은 이전 보고연도와 비교해 어떠합니까?
simpleHelp: Indirect emissions in the value chain are key for this sector. Data users are therefore interested in understanding whether companies are successfully reducing their Scope 3 emissions year on year.
baseOptions: This is our first year of reporting
We don't have any Scope 3 emissions data

guidance.text:
General 
Select the option that best describes how your total Scope 3 emissions have changed compared with the previous year.
In this context, your total Scope 3 emissions are the sum of emissions reported in all Scope 3 categories in 7.8.
If your total Scope 3 emissions have increased because this year you have calculated additional Scope 3 categories, please select "Increased" and you will have the opportunity to provide further details in the following question.
guidance.textKo: 일반 Select the option that best 설명s how your total Scope 3 배출량 have changed compared with the previous year. In this context, your total Scope 3 배출량 are the sum of emissions 보고 in all Scope 3 categories in 7.8. 만약 your total Scope 3 배출량 have increased because this year you have calculated additional Scope 3 categories, please select "Increased" 및 you will have the opportunity to provide further details in the following 문항.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
Any option selected - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
OR
NON-DISCLOSURE ROUTE)
Option NOT selected - 0/6 points
A maximum of 0/6 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 경로 A) 선택지가 하나라도 선택된 경우 - 1 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 1/1점입니다. 또는 비공개 경로) 선택지가 선택되지 않은 경우 - 0/6 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/6점입니다.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
Any option excluding 'We don't have any Scope 3 emissions data' selected - 2 points
A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this route.
OR
NON-DISCLOSURE ROUTE)
Option NOT selected - 0/3 points
A maximum of 0/3 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 경로 A) 하나 이상 option 제외 'We don't have 하나 이상 Scope 3 배출량 data' 선택 - 2 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 2/2점입니다. 또는 비공개 경로) 선택지가 선택되지 않은 경우 - 0/3 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/3점입니다.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
Either 'Decreased' OR 'Remained the same overall' selected - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
'This is our first year of reporting' selected - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 경로 A) Either 'Decreased' 또는 'Remained the same overall' 선택 - 1 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 1/1점입니다. 또는 경로 B) 'This is our first year of reporting' 선택 - 0/0 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/0점입니다.
